title: This Secret Glass Library is Run by Robots
description:
This piece of glass can store data for 10,000 years and is kept in a library managed by robots. 

A laser etches the data inside the glass, permanently encoding it. One piece can store the equivalent of 13 years worth of music or 3,500 movies. 

When your great-great-great-great grandkids are ready to read it, little robots go and fetch the right glass card and bring it to a microscope that scans the data and decodes. 

To find out when you might have a glass library of your own, subscribe! 

#science #tech #data #laser #robot #shorts
